# Third-Party Notices

Use this directory for:

- NOTICE files
- copied license texts when required
- attribution records for vendored third-party code
- modification markers when third-party source was changed

Current state:

- the model integration layer is adapter-based
- no third-party model source code is vendored here by default
- no model weights are bundled here by default

Add one notice file per vendored or specially attributed dependency when needed.
